title: euonymus fortunei var. radicans
intro: Euonymus fortunei var. radicans, also known as the Japanese spindletree or simply Euonymus, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Euonymus fortunei var. radicans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations to harness its medicinal properties.
